title: Discounted Water Service * Older Adults - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Discounted Water Service * Older Adults 5 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Older Adults Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CITY OF CORNELIUS SENIOR CITIZEN WATER DISCOUNT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a monthly discount on the base water rate. 1355 N Barlow Street Cornelius, OR 97113 Eligibility: Age 65 and older. Must reside at the address receiving the discount and is responsible for making payments directly to the City for water service for the address listed on the application. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (503) 357-9112 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF ESTACADA REDUCED RATE UTILITY PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides reduced rates on water, sewer, and storm drain bills. 475 SE Main Street Estacada, OR 97023 Eligibility: Ages 62 and older who are at or below 60% of Oregon’s current median income. Must be the applicant's primary residence, and service must be billed in the applicant's name. Hours: Monday-Thursday 7:30am-5pm Email (503) 630-8270 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF HUBBARD LOW-INCOME SENIOR CITIZENS WATER DISCOUNT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a water utility discount. 3720 Second Street Hubbard, OR 97032 Eligibility: -Age 65 and older -Must meet annual household income requirements -Applications must be renewed annually by July 1st Hours: Monday-Thursday 7am-5:30pm (503) 981-6333 Get Directions Visit Website More Details COMMUNITY SERVICES CONSORTIUM ALBANY REGIONAL OFFICE ALBANY WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a water service discount for low-income older adults and adults with disabilities who are City of Albany water customers. Does not provide funds to pay for water bills. 250 Broadalbin Street SW Suite 2A Albany, OR 97321 Eligibility: Age 60 and older and adults with documented disabilities. Income limits also apply. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 928-6335 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MID-WILLAMETTE VALLEY COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY COMMUNITY ACTION ENERGY SERVICES GARBAGE, SEWER, AND WATER DISCOUNT REFERRAL PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides referral to the City of Salem's Rate Relief program for garbage, sewer, and water discounts. 4700 Silverton Road NE Salem, OR 97305 Eligibility: -City of Salem account holder residing in the home -Age 60 and older or documented permanent disability household member -Gross household income does not exceed 60% of state median income based on family size -Referals made for current year LIHEAP/OEAP recipients (October-September) Hours: Walk in: Monday-Thursday 8am-4:30pm Phones: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, closed holidays Email (503) 588-9016 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CITY OF CORNELIUS SENIOR CITIZEN WATER DISCOUNT CITY OF ESTACADA REDUCED RATE UTILITY PROGRAM CITY OF HUBBARD LOW-INCOME SENIOR CITIZENS WATER DISCOUNT COMMUNITY SERVICES CONSORTIUM ALBANY WATER DISCOUNT PROGRAM MID-WILLAMETTE VALLEY COMMUNITY ACTION AGENCY GARBAGE, SEWER, AND WATER DISCOUNT REFERRAL PROGRAM
